message:
fix(hue,dingtalk,line): redact credentials, sanitize path segments, and truncate error bodies

Security and robustness hardening across three connectors:

- hue: custom Debug impl redacts app_key to prevent credential leakage
  in logs; sanitize_path_segment() strips traversal characters (/, \,
  ?, #, &, %, NUL) from light_id and scene_id before interpolating
  into API URLs; truncate error response bodies at 500 chars; add
  debug_redacts_app_key and sanitize_path_segment_strips_traversal tests
- dingtalk: truncate error response bodies > 500 chars to prevent
  unbounded error messages
- line: extract truncate_error_body() helper and apply to all 4 error
  paths in request_with_retry, upload, download, and send methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
